---
name: "Site Build Pass"
description: "Implement a landing page or website slice from an approved brief and design direction. Use when the page structure is already decided and the work is ready for code."
argument-hint: "Name the repo, framework, files or routes to change, and include the approved brief or design direction."
agent: "Site Builder"
---
Build the requested site slice from the provided brief and design direction.

Requirements:
- Read the existing site structure first
- Match the repo's framework and styling patterns
- Implement only the requested slice
- Keep copy concise and use the approved positioning
- End with changed files, created files, what was verified, and any blockers
